detail: Cycle-2 anchor run: 12/19 spans <60%, structurally diagnosed. CRISIS validated (5/7; both misses are anchor-vs-definition artifacts — the topping lag). THRUST precision-only (the dd-recovery precedence blind spot: suppressed ~12 months after any crisis). GRIND/NARROW/CHOP below the three axes' resolving power — descriptive-only, gating rejected at build time. 2000-09 recorded as caveated FAIL (frozen, not amended). Stability near-miss (spell 13/15, flips 13/12, CHOP D-FLAT 36/70). v2 params frozen; no v3 by iteration — only a from-scratch new pre-registration (new axis, external/held-out ground truth).
